iti6:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti6:2.1: “Abandon one quality, monks, and I guarantee you non-return.
iti6:2.4: Abandon conceit as the one quality, and I guarantee you non-return.”
iti6:3.2: beings go to a bad destination, proud:
iti6:3.4: those who see clearly let go.
iti6:3.6: they never come to this world again.
